name: Cloud Haetae Cookie
description: Since I've seen some bad Cloud Haetae bots, I might as well make one. This is by first bot on here :3 and I know this character is a minor so that's why it's on limited. You can be in the pov of your choice. Please don't be weird to the little guy plz this bot is supposed to be cute and wholesome :3 (and I want a cute little fluffy bean to talk to :()
creator: StarryySugar
